summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Approval Workflow for Sugarcane Disease Detection app. Backend: 33/33 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows tested and working - registration, login, dashboard upload shows 'Submitted for Review', admin panel with pending reviews tab, approve/reject workflow, history page with status badges.
critical_code_review_comments: Detection uses real GPT-5.1 Vision API - minimize test calls to save costs
Admin approval workflow correctly implemented with status field (pending/approved/rejected)
Farmer history correctly hides disease details for pending scans and shows them only after approval
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup with credentials from backend/.env
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin approval workflow fully tested and working. Key features verified: 1) POST /api/detect saves with status='pending', 2) GET /api/admin/pending returns pending scans with AI prediction, 3) POST /api/admin/review/{id} supports approve/reject with disease correction and suggestions, 4) Dashboard shows 'Submitted for Review' after upload (not disease details), 5) History page shows status badges (Pending/Approved/Rejected), 6) Approved items show full details + admin suggestion, 7) Rejected items show admin note, 8) Access control works (regular users cannot access admin endpoints).

features_tested.user_login: PASS - redirects to profile-setup then dashboard
features_tested.admin_login: PASS - admin/ADT@123 works, shows Admin Panel link
features_tested.dashboard_upload: PASS - shows 'Submitted for Review' message after upload
features_tested.admin_pending_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/admin/pending returns pending scans with AI prediction
features_tested.admin_disease_correction: PASS - admin can correct disease name when approving
features_tested.admin_suggestion: PASS - admin can add suggestion when approving/rejecting
features_tested.history_pending_status: PASS - shows 'Pending Review' badge for pending scans
features_tested.history_approved_status: PASS - shows 'Approved' badge with full disease details
features_tested.history_rejected_status: PASS - shows 'Rejected' badge with admin note
features_tested.history_expandable_details: PASS - approved items expand to show symptoms, treatment, prevention, admin suggestion
features_tested.navigation: PASS - Dashboard, History, Disease Library, Admin Panel all work
features_tested.language_toggle: PASS - EN, Hindi, Marathi options available
